message:
feat(evidence): build Evidence Recording UI component (brenner_bot-njjo.3)

Add multi-step EvidenceRecorder component for recording test results:

Steps:
1. Select Test - Choose from Exclusion Test or create custom
2. Record Predictions - Pre-register what you expect
3. Record Observation - Document actual findings
4. Classify Result - Support/Challenge/Inconclusive
5. Interpret - Explain meaning for hypothesis
6. Confirm Update - Preview and confirm confidence change

Features:
- Integration with ExclusionTest types from Exclusion Test operator
- Confidence update preview using 2x asymmetry algorithm
- Pre-filled predictions from selected tests
- Custom test creation with power rating
- Visual confidence change visualization

Files:
- apps/web/src/components/brenner-loop/evidence/EvidenceRecorder.tsx
- apps/web/src/components/brenner-loop/evidence/index.ts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
